title: Resveratrol precursor supply in yeast
text: Engineering Saccharomyces cerevisiae for resveratrol production often requires improving p-coumaric acid and malonyl-CoA precursor supply. Titer and yield depend on pathway balance.

title: Generic flavonoid review
text: Flavonoids are plant secondary metabolites. General reviews discuss antioxidant activity, nutrition, and broad biosynthesis without specific yeast experiments.

title: Stilbene synthase pathway engineering
text: Stilbene synthase converts p-coumaroyl-CoA and malonyl-CoA toward resveratrol. Yeast pathway engineering can compare phenylalanine and tyrosine routes.

title: Clinical nutraceutical outcomes
text: Clinical studies evaluate dietary resveratrol and biomarkers in humans. These studies do not test microbial production or strain engineering.
